feed.title: SAP Community - Cloud Integration
feed.subtitle: Cloud Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Read SFTP Sender Excel file sheetname in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a scenario of getting an XLSX file from an SFTP (sender) using SAP CPI and sending to SAP S4. Here I need to get the sheet name before conversion to xml but I don't know how to do this reading to an Excel file.

Kindly share the groovy script code to read this before using converter class to convert to xml.

entry.title: How to get data sent from Gmail in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Since SAP Integration Suite can use IMAP and POP3 protocols, how can I use these protocols to receive emails in CPI?
What are the requirements for the sender side? If you have any experience with this, please respond.

entry.title: CDN Integration with Accelerator based storefront
entry.content:
Wherever there is any redirection triggered from the the Commerce pods, we observed that HttpServletRequestWrapper.getServerName() does not return the expected Akamai domain but instead returns the internal server name that corresponds to the storefront domain url defined in the cloud portal. 

Can you please provide some guidance on how we can set up HttpServletRequestWrapper.getServerName() to return the CDN domain?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: AIF monitoring in SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are currently using SAP PO/PI 7.5 as Integration platform with in our landscape..

To do AIF(application interface framework) monitoring, to see the end to end message flow from/to S4/ECC regarding outbound/inbound interfaces we have customized Fiori page...

we are using the Fiori page for the following cases..

(i) AIF Messages (ii) AIF Monitoring (iii) Interface monitoring...

In that Fiori page, it shows status of the messages on SAP backend & SAP PO/PI.. also if someone clicks on SAP PO status "hyperlink" of that specific message then it re-directs to the SAP PO monitoring page of that specific message... it is possible to link SAP backend and SAP PO messsage on Fiori page because message ID for outbound messages is same on SAP backend & SAP PO/PI.. it is easier to fetch SAP PO status of the specific message...

Fiori page with SAP PO Message status Hyperlink (here "Success" is hyperlink)..

SAP PO monitoring page of that specific message

We are planning to migrate all the interfaces from SAP PO/PI to SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration)..

Now, what are different alternate options available within SAP BTP to cater this requirement..

1. BTP Based Fiori app 

2. SAP Cloud ALM for end to end monitoring..

AFAIK, the option 1) above is expensive since Fiori developers has to put of lot of efforts to build such app for AIF monitoring.. Could option 2) completely replace the above solution implemented in SAP PO/PI?? Could you please let me know which is better option in terms various factors like Cost, efforts, time to develope/implement, SAP recommendation, standard solution etc.., Thank you!

//Ramu

entry.title: AMQP sender flow deployment issue: POLL_FAILED
entry.content:
Hi All,
we are getting below error when deploying a AMQP based flow:

the flow deployed successfully after un-deploying other AMQP based flow.
are there any constraint issues here? 

Below is the Resource Monitor page for reference:

 



SAP Event Mesh Cloud Integration

entry.title: How can I find the status of a running iFlow by an external client e.g. a Powershell script
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am trying to trigger an iFlow with an HTTP endpoint from a Powershell script. However it is a long running flow and I would like to have an option to monitor that from the script itself periodically. 

is there a monitoring API available that can do that? 

Thanks,

Prabal

entry.title: How could we configure the ServiceNow Open Connector using JWT authentication?
entry.content:
How could we configure the ServiceNow Open Connector using JWT authentication? By default, the authentication is OAuth 2.0. We need some clarification on this. 

Thank you in advance,

BR

entry.title: What's the best way to monitor the progress of an iFlow using a PowerShell script?
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am attempting to trigger an iFlow using an HTTP endpoint from a PowerShell script. Since it is a long-running flow, I would like to incorporate a periodic monitoring feature within the script itself.

Is there a monitoring API available that can facilitate this?

Thanks,

Himanshu

entry.title: Dynamic Extension Setting for File Name Output in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am now trying doing file decompression (Unzip) within SAP CPi. I unzip two files (.txt and .csv) contained in one ZIP file and store them on an FTP server using the FTP Adapter.

In the FTP Adapter settings, there's a place to set the name of the output files (1 txt file and 1 csv file), but how can I dynamically set the "extension" in this case?

 

As an example, this is what I expect.

Input Files' (to be unzipped) Name

> AAA.zip (which contains BBB.txt and CCC.csv)

Output Files

>BBB.txt and CCC.csv

(By the way, when I left the file name setting of FTP adapter blank, then the output files came out as BBB and CCC, which means there was no extension.)

(The attached screenshot shows where the file name is set.)

Thank you.

entry.title: How to increase timeout in powershell script while invoking BTP iflow using Invoke-WebRequest?
entry.content:
Hi All,
I am using PowerShell script Invoke-WebRequest command to trigger an SAP BTP iFlow. When the iflow processes quickly (less than 2 minutes), the PowerShell script receives the correct status. However, if the iflow takes longer than 2 minutes, even though you've set a timeout of 1 hour, the script fails with a "Termination Error (Invoke-webRequest): The connection closed Unexpectedly" message

Thanks 
Himanshu

entry.title: How to get the actual attachment name from Outbound proxy to CPI
entry.content:
Hi Everyone ,
I am trying to capture the attachment names in SAP CPI, from an outbound proxy call from SAP- but I am only getting the attachment ID as name and not the actual attachment name.
I am using the below line in my Groovy - message.setProperty("attachmentName",attachment.getName());
where attachment is a DataHandler object.
In proxy, I have the below name of the attachments -

but in CPI I am getting the attachment name as -payload-000D3A03E1FD1EDF9FC56D07DA1F65E6@sap.com

Could you please help me with this to get the actual attachment name?

Thanks

Sugata

entry.title: Size Limit For Exchange Property in Content Modifier in SAP CPI?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am curious about if there's any size limit for Exchange Property in Content Modifier in SAP CPI?

To be specific, to loop-getting data, I use Looping Process Call to get payload, and create a property (by using content modifier) in order to temporarily store and append data being fetched. The configuration of the property is as follow.

Action: Create

Name: StorePayload

Source Type: Expression

Source Value: ${property.StorePayload}${in.body}

 

I wonder how much data can I temporarily store in this property. (50MB? 100MB?)

 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Monitoring in SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have around 50+ custom iflow interfaces in SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration).

My functional team is asking to give KT on how and what all needs to be monitored on the Cloud Integration to ensure that interfaces are working fine and also check by themselves if some messages are processed successfully. Should we need to define custom headers so that they could search/filter themessages using custom header value in message monitoring. Could you please explain the below different error types in Cloud Integration monitoring?

 

 

They might ask each and everthing on monitoring and they are asking me to make presentation and show it to them.. can someone tell me if there are any such nice blogs regarding monitoring in Cloud Integration. I could make use that blog/article to explain them monitoring of messages..

 

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: Costs Associated with add'l Integration-Flow Service Instances?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have an existing Productive CPI Installation and we're creating integration flows for a new external party to call on our Cloud Integration system. We'd prefer not to use API Management as our integration team is not familiar with it, we'd like to instead create an additional Service Instance that the external party can use as an OAuth Client. To do so I'm following the steps provided by SAP on help.sap.com.

When I bring up the dialog to create the additional new integration-flow plan it notes that "enabling a service might result in costs" (see below). I wouldn't expect having a second integration-flow plan would incur additional costs since it's SAP's recommended way of managing inbound calls from an additional party, but SAP is notoriously opaque about these thigns so I thought I'd ask the community... has anyone had an experience where adding an additional integration-flow plan for a new OAuth Client resulted in additional costs?

Thanks,
Alex

entry.title: I am facing error while deploying Salesforce Adapter
entry.content: I am trying to deploy salesforce adapter on my trail account but facing issue, can anyone help me to resolve it.

entry.title: Parallel multicast to broadcast messages to multiple systems
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have one interface in SAP PO which sends messages to eight partner systems at a time.

Currently if we migrate the interfaces to SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration) , we have the idea to use parallel Multicast pallet option to broadcast the messages to multiple partner systems at a time. But, if we use multicast option then if due to some reason one of the partner system is down, technical connection issue to that partner system (authentication, Firewall issue etc.,).. then all the messages that are supposed to be processed for other partner systems also get stuck in Cloud Integration because of the issue due to one of the partner system. Could you please let us know what is the alternate option available instead of "Parallel Multicast" pallet option in Cloud Integration? Thank you!

Regards,

Ramu.

entry.title: Does anyone know what the rules are for inclusion, to overcome this error?
entry.content: I have the same error when activating the booster, but I have not been successful in solving it. Does anyone know the rules to include to unlock this problem?

entry.title: CPI: API has restriction to pull only 100 records in each call
entry.content:
Hi Experts,


There is a source system and source system is exposing an API and CPI needs to get the data from source system and send it to target system(some third party). But they are some restrictions defined in the source system API level to pick the data.
1st restriction is it can give only 100 records in a call not more than that.
2nd restriction is sender API itself can be called only once per minute.
but i have close to 10k records from source application which needs to transfered to target application.

Please explain how to achieve this in CPI level? it would great helpful if you answer.

entry.title: Infotype 0001An exception with the type CX_SY_DYN_CALL_ILLEGAL_TYPE occurred, but was neither handle
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am currently implementing BIB replication (EC to ERP)

However while testing the replication is error out.

Currently testing for existing employees.

Infotype 0001An exception with the type CX_SY_DYN_CALL_ILLEGAL_TYPE occurred, but was neither handled locally, nor declared in a RAISING clause

Message no. ECPAO_IN_PROCESSING055

Pernr XXXXXXXX : Infotype 0001 with error.

Message no. ECPAO_IN_PROCESSING077

Can any one provide a resolution.

I additionally checked below notes, however existing feature for VSKSI is PME25

https://me.sap.com/notes/3276951/E

https://me.sap.com/notes/3464874/E

Thanks

entry.title: Is there any variable to be changed to increase the timeout from 2min when Autosys triggers the BTP?
entry.content:
Hi All,

Autosys(powershell script) scheduler is timing out in 2 minutes, but the iFlow keep running as long as it is required to complete the processing. While we are checking other possible options, we need to send a ticket to SAP soon to get where this is being configured, from what we know it is not iFlow level configuration.

We tried the following steps:

  • We tried running powershell script directly(skipping autosys), noticed it is getting timeout in 2 mins
  • We tried to invoking CPI endpoint directly from postman(skipping autosys and powershell), it is also getting timeout in 2 mins
  • We created scheduler iflow with in BTP and invoked main flow. There is no timeout happening in scheduler iFlow

 

Is there any variable to be changed to increase the timeout from 2min when Autosys triggers the BTP iflow?

Thanks,

Himani
